notes: v2.1.199 ships 5 new primitives + 15+ reliability fixes: (1) stacked slash-skill invocations /a /b do X now load ALL leading skills up to 5, not just the first (skill-composition primitive); (2) CLAUDE_CODE_RETRY_WATCHDOG env var raises non-capacity-error default retry count to 300 and lifts cap of 15 on CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_RETRIES; (3) transient server 429s (non-usage-limit) auto-retry with backoff for subscribers instead of failing the turn; (4) plan mode auto-allows read-only browser_batch without prompting (state-changing browser calls still gated); (5) claude agents session rows show PR links as bare #N. Reliability fixes: SSL cert errors fail immediately with fix hint (no retry-budget burn); mid-stream API errors keep partial output with incomplete-response notice; subagents cut off by rate limit or server error now return partial work to parent instead of silent failure; subagents that hit API errors report the error to parent instead of reporting error as 'successful' result (silent-failure-through-subagent-boundary fixed). Background-agent fixes: Linux daemon self-kill on corrupted worker record fixed; macOS SSH cold-start audit-session regression from 2.1.196 fixed; claude stop race with respawn fixed; job progress indicator stall fixed; low-memory error surfacing improved. Hook fix: SessionStart/Setup/SubagentStart hooks silently hiding stderr on exit-code-2 now surface errors in transcript. Config safety: corrupted config recovery from startup dialog now backs up file before rewrite. SendMessage misrouting on agent-name reuse detects mismatch. claude --dangerously-skip-permissions daemon <subcommand> now runs subcommand. Claude in Chrome reconnect loop across builds/config-dirs fixed. Four consecutive-day releases (v2.1.196 06-29, v2.1.197 06-30, v2.1.198 07-01, v2.1.199 07-02); v2.1.16x-v2.1.19x architect-prompt slot at 9 workstream rows. v2.1.197 (Sonnet 5 default) remains load-bearing; v2.1.199 second-heaviest. Timestamp reconciliation note: v2.1.198's atom-feed 'updated' timestamp today is 2026-07-02T22:55:04Z (yesterday's cursor recorded 2026-07-01T20:45:36Z) — ~26h delta; plausible causes: (a) release was edited on 07-02 so atom 'updated' advanced, or (b) yesterday's WebFetch-summary-model misparsed the timestamp. Second consecutive day with atom-timestamp reconciliation needed (yesterday: pydantic-ai v2.2.0); recommend hand-review pass at next Weekly Synthesis on whether to add raw_atom_snapshot to per-source state.
